description: Six Flags Entertainment Corporation operates amusement-resort in North America. Its amusement-resort consists of amusement parks, water parks, and resort properties across 17 states in the U.S., Canada, and Mexico. The company provides fun, experiences to various guests with coasters, themed rides, water parks, resorts, and a portfolio of intellectual property, such as Looney Tunes, DC Comics, and PEANUTS. Six Flags Entertainment Corporation was founded in 1983 and is based in Charlotte, North Carolina.
